title: Section 62A Planning Application: S62A/2025/0125 16 Elmgrove Road, Bristol, BS16 2AX
body: "Type of application:  Full Planning Permission  Applicant name:  Andrew Lee, MKJ Construction Ltd  Site address:  16 Elmgrove Road, Bristol, BS16 2AX  Description of proposed development:  Change of use from a dwellinghouse occupied by people to be regarded as forming a single household (Use Class C3a) to a small dwellinghouse in multiple occupation for 3-6 people (Use Class C4), including the erection of a cycle and refuse/recycling stores  Case Officer:  Section 62A Applications Team  Procedure:   Written Representations  Key dates:      Date     Date application valid 23 October 2025   Date by when representations must be made 28 November 2025   Hearing date and venue NA   Target Decision 18 December 2025   Decision date 12 December 2025     Decision   Decision Notice and Statement of Reasons  (PDF, 123 KB, 5 pages)   Make a representation  The application can be inspected under the application plans and documents heading below.  You will be able to comment on this application until 28 November 2025.  Please base your comments on planning matters.  Please avoid the use of inflammatory, discriminatory or abusive comments  All representations made in connection with the development proposal will be made publicly available on the website shortly after the end of the representation period.  The name of the individual author or organisation will be published however addresses, signatures and contact details will not be published.  We advise you not to include any other personal information about yourself or others. Our Customer Privacy Notice sets out how we handle personal data in accordance with the law.  Send your comments via email to  section62anonmajor@planninginspectorate.gov.uk  or write to Section 62A Applications Team, Planning Inspectorate, 3rd Floor, Temple Quay House, 2 The Square, Temple Quay, Bristol, BS1 6PN  Sending comments by email will enable us to deal with them more quickly.  Please include the application reference number S62A/2025/0125 and site address.  This application will be determined by an Inspector appointed by the Secretary of State.  Shortly after the close of the representation period the Planning Inspectorate will consider whether a hearing is necessary.   In the event that a hearing is scheduled, and you would wish to speak at the hearing, you must make this request at the time you submit your written representations.  Where the application is to be considered at a hearing, notice of the date, time and venue for the hearing along with the name of the person holding the hearing, will be published on this website at least one week before the date of the hearing.   Application Plans and Documents     BNG exemption form  (PDF, 3.31 MB, 3 pages)  cil questions  (PDF, 3.67 MB, 6 pages)  16 Elmgrove Rd proposed 2  (PDF, 3.02 MB, 3 pages)  16 Elmgrove Road Site plans  (PDF, 8.8 MB, 1 page)  250915 cover letter PR002016 FINAL  (PDF, 585 KB, 13 pages)  application form  (PDF, 4.8 MB, 14 pages)   Questionnaire and supporting documents   BCS15 - Sustainable Design and Construction  (PDF, 60.8 KB, 3 pages)  BCS16 - Flood Risk and Water Management  (PDF, 57 KB, 3 pages)  BCS18 - Housing Type  (PDF, 89.5 KB, 3 pages)  BCS21 - Quality Urban Design  (PDF, 106...
